results.rendered_html:
bodhaka (vom caus. von 1. budh)
1〉 adj. f. bodhikā Etwas bezeichnend, [Page5-0125] angebend: anubhāvo bhāvabodhakaḥ  AK. 1,1,7,21 . ākārasya strībodhakasya Schol. zu  P. 7,3,46 . vṛttyarthabodhakaṃ vākyaṃ vigrahaḥ zu 2,1,3. 1,2,42. 4,3, Vārtt. 1 .  SĀH. D. 9,13 . 16 . 22,4 . 6 . 7 .  VEDĀNTAS. (Allah.) No. 16 . 95 .
— b〉 aufklärend, belehrend, Lehrer, Unterweiser: mūrkhāṇāṃ bodhako ripuḥ  Spr. 4957 .  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 92,a, N. 2 .
— 2〉 m. N. pr. eines Mannes; pl. seine Nachkommen  PRAVARĀDHY. _in_ Verz. d. B. H. 57,11 v. u. 
— Vgl. dhvani˚, bāla˚.

bodhaka a. (dhikā f.) [budh-ṇic ṇvul]
1 Informing, apprising.
2 Instructing teaching.

1 A spy.
2 A teacher, instructor.
3 A minstrel, bard.
